# Colophon {-}

```{r colophon-info, echo=FALSE}
cat("Built with:\n")
cat("  bookdown: ", as.character(packageVersion("bookdown")), "\n")
cat("  R: ", R.version.string, "\n")
cat("  Build date: ", as.character(Sys.Date()), "\n")
cat("  Commit: ", tryCatch(system("git rev-parse --short HEAD", intern = TRUE), error = \(e) "unknown"), "\n")
cat("\nAttached packages:\n")
print(sessioninfo::session_info(pkgs = "attached"))
```

LLM assistance (self-hosted Mistral Le Chat via Ollama/`ollamar`, plus
GitHub Copilot in RStudio) was used for copyediting, formatting, and
scaffolding tasks only — see Acknowledgments.

```{r packages-bib, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
knitr::write_bib(
  c(.packages(), "bookdown", "knitr", "rmarkdown"),
  file = "packages.bib"
)
```
